overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned industrial or institutional building, likely from a survival horror video game. The player walks through a dark, narrow corridor with peeling blue paint and debris, then enters a large open room with concrete pillars and natural light streaming through windows. The footage features high-quality atmospheric lighting and detailed environmental decay typical of modern game engines.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow, dark corridor in an abandoned building. The walls are painted blue but heavily deteriorated, and debris litters the floor. The atmosphere is claustrophobic and dimly lit, with no other characters present.

entered.detail: doorway frame leading to a brightly lit room with visible concrete pillars

tall window allowing natural light to enter from the adjacent room

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a doorway on the right side of the corridor, where natural light begins to illuminate the scene. The spatial layout remains narrow but the lighting shifts from dark to mixed as the open room becomes visible through the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned open-plan office with concrete pillars and large windows

tall floor-to-ceiling windows allowing diffused natural light to fill the space
damaged office furniture and filing cabinets scattered across the debris-covered floor
leafless winter trees visible through the large windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a large abandoned office space with high ceilings and massive concrete pillars. Natural light streams through tall windows on the right, revealing bare winter trees outside. The floor is covered in debris and broken office furniture, creating an atmosphere of post-industrial decay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit hallway into a vast, light-filled industrial ruin. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor characterized by peeling blue paint and debris-strewn floors under oppressive darkness. As the camera approaches a doorway on the right, the gloom begins to recede, replaced by a gradual influx of natural light that signals a transition in the spatial layout. The scene then opens wide into a massive abandoned office space, where the narrow walls give way to high ceilings and towering concrete pillars. Finally, the view expands to reveal tall windows streaming with light and a vista of bare winter trees, illuminating a landscape of broken furniture and post-industrial decay.
